Alias.name: Offense toggle
Offense on
Offense off
Offense status
Alias.script:
-- ^occstatus$ -> print current offense state Yso = Yso or {} Yso.off = Yso.off or {} Yso.off.oc = Yso.off.oc or {} local Off = Yso.off.oc local st = Off.state or {} local tgt = "" if type(Yso.get_target) == "function" then local ok, v = pcall(Yso.get_target) if ok then tgt = tostring(v or "") end end if tgt == "" then tgt = tostring(Yso.target or rawget(_G, "target") or "") end
local function yn(v) return v == true and "YES" or "no" end
local lines = { string.format(" enabled : %s", yn(st.enabled)), string.format(" mode : %s", tostring(st.mode or Off.cfg and Off.cfg.mode or "?")), string.format(" ai : %s", tostring(st.ai or "?")), string.format(" tarot : %s", tostring(st.tarot or "?")), string.format(" target : %s", tgt ~= "" and tgt or "(none)"), }
cecho("<orange>[Yso:Occ] Offense status:\n") for _, l in ipairs(lines) do cecho(string.format("<white>%s\n", l)) end
local GD = Off.group_damage or Off.dmg if GD and GD.state then cecho(string.format("<white> gd : %s\n", yn(GD.state.enabled))) end

Alias.name: Set offense target
Alias.script: -- ^tt (\w+)$ -> set offense target local tgt = (matches[2] or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","") if tgt == "" then cecho("<red>[YSO]<reset> Usage: tt <name>\n") return end Yso = Yso or {} Yso.off = Yso.off or {} Yso.off.oc = Yso.off.oc or {} if type(Yso.off.oc.set_target) == "function" then Yso.off.oc.set_target(tgt) elseif type(Yso.set_target) == "function" then Yso.set_target(tgt) else rawset(_G, "target", tgt) Yso.target = tgt end cecho(string.format("<orange>[Yso:Occ]<reset> Target set: %s\n", tgt))

Alias.name: Set AI profile
Alias.script: -- ^occai(?:\s+(\w+))?$ -> set or show AI profile (lock, etc.) Yso = Yso or {} Yso.off = Yso.off or {} Yso.off.oc = Yso.off.oc or {} local arg = (matches[2] or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","") if arg == "" then local ai = "?" if type(Yso.off.oc.get_ai) == "function" then ai = Yso.off.oc.get_ai() end cecho(string.format("<orange>[Yso:Occ]<reset> AI: %s\n", tostring(ai))) return end if type(Yso.off.oc.set_ai) == "function" then Yso.off.oc.set_ai(arg) else cecho("<red>[YSO]<reset> Offense module not loaded.\n") end

Alias.name: Set tarot focus
Alias.script: -- ^occtarot(?:\s+(\w+))?$ -> set or show tarot focus (aeon, etc.) Yso = Yso or {} Yso.off = Yso.off or {} Yso.off.oc = Yso.off.oc or {} local arg = (matches[2] or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","") if arg == "" then local t = "?" if type(Yso.off.oc.get_tarot) == "function" then t = Yso.off.oc.get_tarot() end cecho(string.format("<orange>[Yso:Occ]<reset> Tarot: %s\n", tostring(t))) return end if type(Yso.off.oc.set_tarot) == "function" then Yso.off.oc.set_tarot(arg) else cecho("<red>[YSO]<reset> Offense module not loaded.\n") end

Alias.name: Set offense mode
Alias.script: -- ^occmode(?:\s+(\w+))?$ -> set or show offense mode (duel, custom) Yso = Yso or {} Yso.off = Yso.off or {} Yso.off.oc = Yso.off.oc or {} local arg = (matches[2] or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","") if arg == "" then local m = "?" if type(Yso.off.oc.get_mode) == "function" then m = Yso.off.oc.get_mode() end cecho(string.format("<orange>[Yso:Occ]<reset> Mode: %s\n", tostring(m))) return end if type(Yso.off.oc.set_mode) == "function" then Yso.off.oc.set_mode(arg) else cecho("<red>[YSO]<reset> Offense module not loaded.\n") end

Alias.name: Combat route - lim
EQ-only attack
Instill affliction
Alias.script: -- ^ins (\w+)(?:\s+(\w+))?$ -> instill <aff> [target] local aff = (matches[2] or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","") if aff == "" then cecho("<red>[YSO]<reset> Usage: ins <aff> [target]\n") return end local tgt = nil if Yso and type(Yso.resolve_target) == "function" then local ok, res = pcall(Yso.resolve_target, matches[3], { set = true, source = "manual" }) if ok then tgt = res end end if not tgt then cecho("<red>[YSO]<reset> No target.\n"); return end local Q = Yso.queue if Q and type(Q.eq_clear) == "function" then Q.eq_clear("instill " .. tgt .. " with " .. aff) elseif type(send) == "function" then send("instill " .. tgt .. " with " .. aff) end

Alias.name: Regress
Alias.script: -- ^reg(?:\s+(\w+))?$ -> REGRESS [target] local tgt = nil if Yso and type(Yso.resolve_target) == "function" then local ok, res = pcall(Yso.resolve_target, matches[2], { set = true, source = "manual" }) if ok then tgt = res end end if not tgt then cecho("<red>[YSO]<reset> No target.\n"); return end local Q = Yso.queue if Q and type(Q.eq_clear) == "function" then Q.eq_clear("REGRESS " .. tgt) elseif type(send) == "function" then send("REGRESS " .. tgt) end

Alias.name: Shrivel
Alias.script: -- ^shr (left|right|l|r) (arm|leg|a|l)(?:\s+(\w+))?$ -> SHRIVEL limb local side = (matches[2] or ""):lower() local limb = (matches[3] or ""):lower() if side == "l" then side = "left" end if side == "r" then side = "right" end if limb == "a" then limb = "arm" end if limb == "l" then limb = "leg" end local tgt = nil if Yso and type(Yso.resolve_target) == "function" then local ok, res = pcall(Yso.resolve_target, matches[4], { set = true, source = "manual" }) if ok then tgt = res end end if not tgt then cecho("<red>[YSO]<reset> No target.\n"); return end local cmd = string.format("SHRIVEL %s %s %s", side, limb, tgt) local Q = Yso.queue if Q and type(Q.eq_clear) == "function" then Q.eq_clear(cmd) elseif type(send) == "function" then send(cmd) end

Alias.name: Bodywarp limb
Alias.script: -- ^bw (left|right|l|r) (arm|leg|a|l)(?:\s+(\w+))?$ -> BODYWARP limb [lesser work] local side = (matches[2] or ""):lower() local limb = (matches[3] or ""):lower() if side == "l" then side = "left" end if side == "r" then side = "right" end if limb == "a" then limb = "arm" end if limb == "l" then limb = "leg" end local tgt = nil if Yso and type(Yso.resolve_target) == "function" then local ok, res = pcall(Yso.resolve_target, matches[4], { set = true, source = "manual" }) if ok then tgt = res end end if not tgt then cecho("<red>[YSO]<reset> No target.\n"); return end local cmd = string.format("BODYWARP %s %s %s", tgt, side, limb) local Q = Yso.queue if Q and type(Q.eq_clear) == "function" then Q.eq_clear(cmd) elseif type(send) == "function" then send(cmd) end

Alias.name: Utter Truename
Alias.script:
-- ^utter(?:\s+(\w+))?$ -> UTTER TRUENAME <target> local tgt = nil if Yso and type(Yso.resolve_target) == "function" then local ok, res = pcall(Yso.resolve_target, matches[2], { set = true, source = "manual" }) if ok then tgt = res end end if not tgt then cecho("<red>[YSO]<reset> No target.\n"); return end
local TB = Yso and Yso.occ and Yso.occ.truebook if TB and type(TB.can_utter) == "function" and not TB.can_utter(tgt) then cecho(string.format("<red>[YSO]<reset> No truename memorised for %s.\n", tgt)) return end
local Q = Yso.queue if Q and type(Q.eq_clear) == "function" then Q.eq_clear("UTTER TRUENAME " .. tgt) elseif type(send) == "function" then send("UTTER TRUENAME " .. tgt) end

Alias.name: Enlighten
Alias.script: -- ^enl(?:\s+(\w+))?$ -> ENLIGHTEN <target> local tgt = nil if Yso and type(Yso.resolve_target) == "function" then local ok, res = pcall(Yso.resolve_target, matches[2], { set = true, source = "manual" }) if ok then tgt = res end end if not tgt then cecho("<red>[YSO]<reset> No target.\n"); return end local Q = Yso.queue if Q and type(Q.eq_clear) == "function" then Q.eq_clear("ENLIGHTEN " .. tgt) elseif type(send) == "function" then send("ENLIGHTEN " .. tgt) end

Alias.name: Unravel
Alias.script: -- ^unr(?:\s+(\w+))?$ -> UNRAVEL MIND OF <target> local tgt = nil if Yso and type(Yso.resolve_target) == "function" then local ok, res = pcall(Yso.resolve_target, matches[2], { set = true, source = "manual" }) if ok then tgt = res end end if not tgt then cecho("<red>[YSO]<reset> No target.\n"); return end local Q = Yso.queue if Q and type(Q.eq_clear) == "function" then Q.eq_clear("UNRAVEL MIND OF " .. tgt) elseif type(send) == "function" then send("UNRAVEL MIND OF " .. tgt) end

Alias.name: Whisperingmadness
Alias.script: -- ^wm(?:\s+(\w+))?$ -> WHISPERINGMADNESS <target> local tgt = nil if Yso and type(Yso.resolve_target) == "function" then local ok, res = pcall(Yso.resolve_target, matches[2], { set = true, source = "manual" }) if ok then tgt = res end end if not tgt then cecho("<red>[YSO]<reset> No target.\n"); return end local Q = Yso.queue if Q and type(Q.eq_clear) == "function" then Q.eq_clear("WHISPERINGMADNESS " .. tgt) elseif type(send) == "function" then send("WHISPERINGMADNESS " .. tgt) end

Alias.name: Devolve
Alias.script: -- ^dev(?:\s+(\w+))?$ -> DEVOLVE <target> local tgt = nil if Yso and type(Yso.resolve_target) == "function" then local ok, res = pcall(Yso.resolve_target, matches[2], { set = true, source = "manual" }) if ok then tgt = res end end if not tgt then cecho("<red>[YSO]<reset> No target.\n"); return end local Q = Yso.queue if Q and type(Q.eq_clear) == "function" then Q.eq_clear("DEVOLVE " .. tgt) elseif type(send) == "function" then send("DEVOLVE " .. tgt) end

Alias.name: Enervate
Alias.script: -- ^ener(?:\s+(\w+))?$ -> ENERVATE <target> local tgt = nil if Yso and type(Yso.resolve_target) == "function" then local ok, res = pcall(Yso.resolve_target, matches[2], { set = true, source = "manual" }) if ok then tgt = res end end if not tgt then cecho("<red>[YSO]<reset> No target.\n"); return end local Q = Yso.queue if Q and type(Q.eq_clear) == "function" then Q.eq_clear("ENERVATE " .. tgt) elseif type(send) == "function" then send("ENERVATE " .. tgt) end

Alias.name: Compel
Alias.script: -- ^comp (\w+)(?:\s+(\w+))?$ -> COMPEL <target> <compulsion> local compulsion = (matches[2] or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","") if compulsion == "" then cecho("<red>[YSO]<reset> Usage: comp <compulsion> [target]\n") return end local tgt = nil if Yso and type(Yso.resolve_target) == "function" then local ok, res = pcall(Yso.resolve_target, matches[3], { set = true, source = "manual" }) if ok then tgt = res end end if not tgt then cecho("<red>[YSO]<reset> No target.\n"); return end local Q = Yso.queue if Q and type(Q.eq_clear) == "function" then Q.eq_clear("COMPEL " .. tgt .. " " .. compulsion) elseif type(send) == "function" then send("COMPEL " .. tgt .. " " .. compulsion) end

Alias.name: Entity command
Alias.script: -- ^ent (\w+)(?:\s+(.+))?$ -> COMMAND <entity> AT <target> [args] local ent = (matches[2] or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","") local rest = (matches[3] or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","") if ent == "" then cecho("<red>[YSO]<reset> Usage: ent <entity> [extra args]\n") return end local tgt = nil if Yso and type(Yso.resolve_target) == "function" then local ok, res = pcall(Yso.resolve_target, nil, { set = false, source = "manual" }) if ok then tgt = res end end if not tgt or tgt == "" then if type(Yso.get_target) == "function" then local ok, v = pcall(Yso.get_target) if ok then tgt = tostring(v or "") end end end if not tgt or tgt == "" then tgt = tostring(rawget(_G, "target") or "") end tgt = tgt:gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","") if tgt == "" then cecho("<red>[YSO]<reset> No target.\n"); return end local cmd if rest ~= "" then cmd = string.format("COMMAND %s AT %s %s", ent, tgt, rest) else cmd = string.format("COMMAND %s AT %s", ent, tgt) end local Q = Yso.queue if Q and type(Q.class_clear) == "function" then Q.class_clear(cmd) elseif type(send) == "function" then send(cmd) end

Alias.name: Entourage attack
Alias.script: -- ^entattack$ -> order entourage kill <target> local tgt = "" if Yso and type(Yso.get_target) == "function" then local ok, v = pcall(Yso.get_target) if ok then tgt = tostring(v or "") end end if tgt == "" then tgt = tostring(rawget(_G, "target") or "") end tgt = tgt:gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","") if tgt == "" then cecho("<red>[YSO]<reset> No target.\n"); return end local Q = Yso.queue if Q and type(Q.free) == "function" then Q.free("order entourage kill " .. tgt) elseif type(send) == "function" then send("order entourage kill " .. tgt) end

Alias.name: Entourage passive
Alias.script: -- ^entpass$ -> order entourage passive local Q = Yso and Yso.queue if Q and type(Q.free) == "function" then Q.free("order entourage passive") elseif type(send) == "function" then send("order entourage passive") end

Alias.name: Cure predictor toggle
Alias.script: -- ^predict$ -> toggle cure predictor on/off; with arg: dump for target local arg = (matches[2] or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","") if arg and arg:lower() == "dump" then local t = (Yso and Yso.get_target and Yso.get_target()) or (Yso and Yso.target) or rawget(_G, "target") or "" if Yso.predict and Yso.predict.cure and type(Yso.predict.cure.dump) == "function" then Yso.predict.cure.dump(t) end else if Yso.predict and type(Yso.predict.toggle) == "function" then Yso.predict.toggle() else cecho("<red>[YSO]<reset> Predict module not loaded.\n") end end

Alias.name: Fling aeon
Alias.script: -- ^faeon(?:\s+(\w+))?$ -> fling aeon at <target> local tgt = nil if Yso and type(Yso.resolve_target) == "function" then local ok, res = pcall(Yso.resolve_target, matches[2], { set = true, source = "manual" }) if ok then tgt = res end end if not tgt then cecho("<red>[YSO]<reset> No target.\n"); return end local Q = Yso.queue if Q and type(Q.bal_clear) == "function" then Q.bal_clear("fling aeon at " .. tgt) elseif type(send) == "function" then send("fling aeon at " .. tgt) end

Alias.name: Fling moon
Alias.script: -- ^fmoon (\w+)(?:\s+(\w+))?$ -> fling moon at <target> <aff> local aff = (matches[2] or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","") if aff == "" then cecho("<red>[YSO]<reset> Usage: fmoon <aff> [target]\n") return end local tgt = nil if Yso and type(Yso.resolve_target) == "function" then local ok, res = pcall(Yso.resolve_target, matches[3], { set = true, source = "manual" }) if ok then tgt = res end end if not tgt then cecho("<red>[YSO]<reset> No target.\n"); return end local Q = Yso.queue if Q and type(Q.bal_clear) == "function" then Q.bal_clear("fling moon at " .. tgt .. " " .. aff) elseif type(send) == "function" then send("fling moon at " .. tgt .. " " .. aff) end

Alias.name: Fling lust
Alias.script: -- ^flust(?:\s+(\w+))?$ -> fling lust at <target> local tgt = nil if Yso and type(Yso.resolve_target) == "function" then local ok, res = pcall(Yso.resolve_target, matches[2], { set = true, source = "manual" }) if ok then tgt = res end end if not tgt then cecho("<red>[YSO]<reset> No target.\n"); return end local Q = Yso.queue if Q and type(Q.bal_clear) == "function" then Q.bal_clear("fling lust at " .. tgt) elseif type(send) == "function" then send("fling lust at " .. tgt) end

Alias.name: Fling empress
Alias.script: -- ^femp(?:\s+(\w+))?$ -> outd empress && fling empress <target> local tgt = nil if Yso and type(Yso.resolve_target) == "function" then local ok, res = pcall(Yso.resolve_target, matches[2], { set = true, source = "manual" }) if ok then tgt = res end end if not tgt then cecho("<red>[YSO]<reset> No target.\n"); return end local Q = Yso.queue if Q and type(Q.free) == "function" then Q.free("outd empress") end if Q and type(Q.bal_clear) == "function" then Q.bal_clear("fling empress " .. tgt) elseif type(send) == "function" then send("outd empress&&fling empress " .. tgt) end

Alias.name: Ruinate lovers (manaleech)
Alias.script: -- ^rlove(?:\s+(\w+))?$ -> ruinate lovers <target> local tgt = nil if Yso and type(Yso.resolve_target) == "function" then local ok, res = pcall(Yso.resolve_target, matches[2], { set = true, source = "manual" }) if ok then tgt = res end end if not tgt then cecho("<red>[YSO]<reset> No target.\n"); return end local Q = Yso.queue if Q and type(Q.bal_clear) == "function" then Q.bal_clear("ruinate lovers at " .. tgt) elseif type(send) == "function" then send("ruinate lovers at " .. tgt) end

Alias.name: Ruinate justice (limb conversion)
Alias.script: -- ^rjust(?:\s+(\w+))?$ -> ruinate justice <target> local tgt = nil if Yso and type(Yso.resolve_target) == "function" then local ok, res = pcall(Yso.resolve_target, matches[2], { set = true, source = "manual" }) if ok then tgt = res end end if not tgt then cecho("<red>[YSO]<reset> No target.\n"); return end local Q = Yso.queue if Q and type(Q.bal_clear) == "function" then Q.bal_clear("ruinate justice " .. tgt) elseif type(send) == "function" then send("ruinate justice " .. tgt) end

Alias.name: Fling death
Alias.script: -- ^fdeath(?:\s+(\w+))?$ -> fling death at <target> local tgt = nil if Yso and type(Yso.resolve_target) == "function" then local ok, res = pcall(Yso.resolve_target, matches[2], { set = true, source = "manual" }) if ok then tgt = res end end if not tgt then cecho("<red>[YSO]<reset> No target.\n"); return end local Q = Yso.queue if Q and type(Q.bal_clear) == "function" then Q.bal_clear("fling death at " .. tgt) elseif type(send) == "function" then send("fling death at " .. tgt) end
